CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt32, values Array(Int32));
SELECT arrayEnumerateUniqRanked(1, values, 1) FROM test_table WHERE id = 1;
SELECT arrayEnumerateUniqRanked(1, values, 2) FROM test_table WHERE id = 2;
SELECT arrayEnumerateUniqRanked(2, values, 2) FROM test_table WHERE id = 2;
SELECT id, arrayEnumerateUniqRanked(1, values, 1) AS enumerated FROM test_table WHERE id IN (1, 2);
SELECT id, arrayEnumerateUniqRanked(1, values, 2) AS enumerated FROM test_table WHERE id > 1 ORDER BY id;
WITH (arrayEnumerateUniqRanked(1, [1, 2, 3, 1, 2, 3], 1)) AS enumerated_array SELECT id, enumerated_array FROM test_table;
SELECT id, arrayEnumerateUniqRanked(1, flatten(values), 2) AS enumerated_flat FROM test_table;
SELECT id, arrayEnumerateUniqRanked(1, values, 1) AS enumerated_1, arrayEnumerateUniqRanked(2, values, 2) AS enumerated_2 FROM test_table WHERE id < 3;
SELECT a.id, arrayEnumerateUniqRanked(1, a.values, 2) FROM test_table AS a JOIN (SELECT id, [1,2,3] AS values) AS b ON a.id = b.id;
